immigration.summary: Neutral factual summary of stated position or recorded votes. Replace this.

faith.summary: Publicly stated faith / on-record statements only.

economic_nationalism.summary: Local infrastructure, manufacturing, employment, procurement, foreign ownership.

foreign_policy.summary: Foreign-policy positions and votes, including foreign aid and Middle East policy.

donors.summary: Summarise disclosed donations from AEC records.
